mxCell.value:
+ register(): boolean
+ login(): boolean
+ viewAvailableLots(): List<Lot>
+ filterLots(maxBudget, blockNum): List<Lot>
+ createReservation(buyer,lot): Transaction
+ processSale(buyer, lot): Transaction
+ printAmortizationTable(lot): void
+ computeCommission(): double
+ generateBuyerReport(): String

- name: String
- email: String
- password: String

- buyerId: String
- budget: double
- buyer Type: BuyerType

+ register(): boolean
+ login(): boolean
+ viewAvailableLots(): List<Lot>
+ viewMyTransactions(): List<Transaction>
+ computeAffordability(lot, years): double

- blkNum: int
- lotNum: int
- transactionStatus: Status
- houseModel: PropertyUnit
- block: Block

<<abstract>>
PropertyUnit

# modelName: String
# lotArea: int
# floorArea: int 
# estimatedTCP: double
# loanableAmount: double
# reservationFee: double
# downPayment: double
# dpTarget: double
# dpPeriod: double
# interestRate: double
# phase: phase

<<enumeration>>
Phase

<<abstract>>
Discount

- transactionID: String 
- amount: double
- isPaid: boolean
- installmentPlan: int
- installmentsPaid: int
- paymentMethod: PaymentMethod
- discount: Discount
- lot: Lot
- buyer: Buyer
- transactionStatus: Status

+ processPayment(): void
+ validatePayment(): boolean
+ getDetails(): String 
+ getFinalTCP(): double
+ setTransactionStatus(newStatus: Status)

<<enumeration>>
BuyerType

- membershipId: String
- loanType: String
- loanAmount: double
- approved: boolean

+ validate(): boolean
+ pay (amount: double) : void
+ applyLoan(): void
+ validateApproval(): boolean
+ computeLoanRate():

<<interface>>
PaymentMethod

- platformName: String = "Lumina In-House"
- account Number: String
- loanTerm: int
- installmentsPaid : int
- propertyUnit : PropertyUnit

+ validate(): boolean
+ pay(amount : double): void
+ getMonthlyDue() : double
+ getRemainingBalance(): double
